heading: Today
text: Mostly sunny.  Not as cold.  Highs from 40 to 50 north to south.  Light winds, becoming south near 10 mph through the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear, with a few clouds late.  Lows in the upper teens to mid 20s from the Green Mountains east, and sheltered areas west, near 30 in the broader valleys west.  Winds light east of the Green Mountains, and south 10 to 15 mph from the Green Mountains west.

heading: Thursday
text: Sun mixing with some afternoon clouds.  Breezy and milder.  Highs in the 50s, near 60 in the warmer valleys west and south.  South winds 10 to 15 mph east, and 10 to 25 mph, gusting to 35 mph from the Green Mountains west.
